news.summary: As of March 31, 2025, the total number of shares and voting rights in the share capital amounted to a specific figure as per the provisions of Articles L. 233-8 (II) of the French Commercial Code and 223-16 of the General Regulations of the French Financial Markets Authority.
news.headline: March 31, 2025: Voltalia SA reports total number of shares and voting rights in share capital per French Commercial Code.

news.summary: United Imaging, a leading global manufacturer of advanced medical imaging technology, recently unveiled the first uMI Panorama™ in Florida. This cutting-edge technology is being featured at a state-of-the-art facility located in Jupiter, FL. The uMI Panorama strives to provide a patient-centered approach to medical imaging and marks a significant advancement in the field. The facility in Jupiter is equipped with the latest technology, aiming to enhance the quality of healthcare services in the region.
news.headline: Florida Theranostics introduces the first uMI Panorama™ digital PET/CT in Florida at its new facility in Jupiter, Palm Beach County. Global manufacturer United Imaging brings cutting-edge medical imaging technology to the region.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that global temperatures have risen by an average of 1.2 degrees Celsius above pre-industrial levels. This increase has brought extreme weather events such as wildfires and heatwaves, affecting millions of people worldwide. In 2020 alone, there were over 50 recorded wildfires, with approximately 4.7 million acres of land destroyed. Additionally, over 100 heatwaves were reported, causing severe health risks and economic damage. Scientists warn that urgent action is needed to mitigate the impacts of climate change and prevent further escalation of these devastating events.
news.headline: Fiserv will announce Q1 earnings on April 24, 2025.

news.summary: In Durham, North Carolina on April 10, 2025, a U.S.-based nonprofit organization known as Saving Nature has successfully acquired 865 acres of land in Colombia's Western Andes. This acquisition is a crucial initiative aimed at safeguarding one of the most ecologically diverse and endangered areas globally. The parcel of land obtained consists of 247 acres earmarked for restoration efforts, showcasing a commitment to environmental conservation.
news.headline: Saving Nature acquired 865 acres in Colombia's Western Andes to expand wildlife habitat, with 247 acres for restoration.

news.summary: In Fort Myers, Florida on April 10, 2025, ADDMAN collaborated with Create it REAL to introduce ADDCAAM™, their acclaimed slicing software, as a plugin for REALvision Pro. This partnership expands the reach of ADDCAAM to manufacturers, providing them with access to this patented technology.
news.headline: ADDMAN partners with Create it REAL to offer ADDCAAM™ tech as plugin for REALvision Pro, expanding reach to manufacturers.

news.summary: Specialty materials company Arkema has completed the conversion of all acrylic thickeners produced in Europe to maintain their high performance levels. As a result of this initiative, the thickeners now contain up to 30% bio-based content, representing a significant improvement in sustainability. Additionally, there has been up to a 25% reduction in product carbon footprint compared to standard thickeners.
news.headline: Arkema shifts acrylic thickeners production in Europe to be 30% bio-based, reducing carbon footprint by up to 25%.

news.summary: A company called Lyte Fiber, LLC has shared their intentions to introduce a cutting-edge regional fiber network in Uvalde, Texas, with an initial investment of around $10 million. This Texas-based company aims to establish a high-speed network capable of delivering multi-gigabit speeds.
news.headline: Lyte Fiber invests $10M to build multi-Gigabit fiber network in Uvalde, Texas and surrounding areas.
Fed's Goolsbee: Current inflation expectations are mixed, but long-term are still pretty anchored.

news.summary: Leading the way in support for light bladder leaks, Poise® has released a documentary shedding light on the challenges facing women in rural health deserts. The film, debuted in Chicago on April 10, 2025, highlights the impact on perimenopausal and menopausal women. As the top brand in this space, Poise® aims to bring attention to the struggles faced by women in underserved areas.
news.headline: Poise® collaborates for women's health in rural areas with a documentary highlighting issues in rural health deserts.

news.summary: A renowned yearly awards program has honored companies and products that are spearheading innovation in the worldwide clean technology sector. On April 10, 2025, Highland Electric Fleets, a prominent provider of electrification-as-a-service for school bus fleets, unveiled its latest achievements.
news.headline: Highland Electric Fleets won "Clean Technology Transportation Company of the Year" award. Beverly, Mass., April 10, 2025.

news.summary: Dallas-based construction company Rogers-O'Brien Construction (RO) is solidifying its position as a key player in constructing advanced manufacturing facilities. These facilities are designed to cater to various industries such as semiconductor fabrication, pharmaceutical production, and clean energy manufacturing. With an emphasis on high-performance environments, RO aims to provide cutting-edge spaces that meet the specific needs of these sectors.
news.headline: Rogers-O'Brien Construction is expanding advanced manufacturing facility construction in Texas, focusing on semiconductor, pharmaceutical, and clean energy sectors.
Fed's Goolsbee: The level of long term inflation expectations are very important.

news.summary: Meanwhile, a crypto startup, has raised $40 million in a Series A investment round led by Framework Ventures and Fulgur Ventures, with additional backing from Xapo founder Wences Casares. The company, based in Bermuda and regulated by the Bermuda Monetary Authority, offers life insurance policies denominated in Bitcoin, allowing policyholders to protect their payouts against currency devaluation. The startup had previously secured $20.5 million in seed funding. The policies, which operate similarly to traditional life insurance but with premiums paid in BTC, are targeted at individuals in inflation-prone economies. Despite uncertainties around Bitcoin's role as an inflation hedge, it has shown resilience and significant outperformance against inflation since its inception. Bitcoin's price experienced volatility following the latest US inflation data, signaling investors' concerns.
news.headline: Meanwhile secures $40M for BTC life insurance in high inflation regions. Also received $20.5M prior. Source: Anonymous

news.summary: Market participants are facing the most unpredictable stock market in years following a sudden reversal by President Trump. The equity market has experienced heightened volatility, with the VIX reaching levels not seen since the financial crisis of 2008. Traders are struggling to navigate this turbulent environment, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average swinging by hundreds of points on a daily basis. The uncertainty has led to intense speculation and rapid fluctuations in stock prices, leaving investors on edge. The unprecedented levels of volatility have prompted many to reevaluate their trading strategies and risk management techniques in order to cope with the market's unpredictability.
news.headline: Market experiences highest volatility in decades post Trump's reversal, challenging traders.

news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the global economy is projected to decrease by 4.9% this year due to the impact of the ongoing pandemic. The International Monetary Fund has outlined that the global economy contracted by 3.5% in 2020, with an estimated loss of $22 trillion in output. The IMF has also suggested that the recovery process may be long and uncertain, particularly for countries with limited access to vaccines and fiscal support. Furthermore, the organization highlighted the importance of international cooperation in addressing the economic challenges posed by the pandemic.
news.headline: Aptior, a distressed specialist, finds opportunity in chaos, per Bloomberg report.
Fed's Goolsbee: Tariffs deliver a stagflationary shock to the economy.

news.summary: In a significant development illustrating the growing integration of AI and data center technology, Hypertec Cloud, a top AI cloud platform based in Montreal, has made a major acquisition by securing 5C Data Centers. This corporation specializes in colocation services and data center facilities. The acquisition is notable because 5C Data Centers boasts a total of more than 2 gigawatts (GW) of projected capacity in its infrastructure roadmap.
news.headline: Hypertec Cloud acquires 5C Data Centers, forming 5C Group, creating one of the largest AI digital infrastructure providers in NA.

news.summary: In the city known for its design prowess, Milan, a groundbreaking solar energy system named SmartFlower has made a significant impact. This innovative system, which mimics the movement of a flower to track the sun and maximize energy absorption, has been chosen to be featured in Vanity Fair Italia's Garden of Ideas during the prestigious Milan Design Week 2025. The event, set to take place on April 10, 2025, will showcase SmartFlower's cutting-edge technology to a wide audience. This recognition underscores the growing importance of sustainable energy solutions in the world's design capital.
news.headline: SmartFlower solar energy system chosen for Vanity Fair Italia's Garden of Ideas at Milan Design Week 2025. Sunflower-shaped, it follows the sun.

news.summary: Virgil Griffith's attorney, Alexander Urbelis, mentioned that Virgil had eagerly anticipated his upcoming transformation.
news.headline: Crypto developer Virgil Griffith released from custody as his lawyer shared he looked forward to a new start.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, The Menkiti Group, a minority-owned real estate company based in Washington, D.C., revealed a new partnership with VPG to purchase Arbor Place Apartments in Terrytown, LA. This multifamily property consists of 136 units and is situated near New Orleans.
news.headline: Menkiti Group partners with VPG to acquire Arbor Place Apartments, a 136-unit property in Terrytown, LA to preserve affordable housing.

news.summary: Today in Chicago, on April 10, 2025, Sarfaraz K. Niazi, who works as an adjunct professor at the University of Illinois, filed a petition against the Nobel Prize Foundation regarding the 2024 Chemistry Prize selection. Niazi published a peer-reviewed scientific paper, raising concerns about the selection process.
news.headline: Prof challenges 2024 Chemistry Nobel Prize on predicting 3D protein structure; files petition; refutes Rosetta & AlphaFold.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 10, 2025, an inventor from Everett, Washington expressed their goal to enhance the attitude and instrument reference display for aircraft. The inventor introduced the A.I.R.D. Head Up Display which provides direct reference and support in controlling aircraft operations. This innovative display system aims to improve navigation and enhance safety measures for pilots.
news.headline: Inventor from Everett, Wash. develops A.I.R.D. Head Up Display for aircraft to enhance attitude & instrument reference.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 10, 2025, an inventor from Hayward, California shared their creation of a versatile stand designed for hands-free utilization of cell phones or tablets. This stand offers full adjustability and can be used in various seating positions such as chairs, beds, sofas, or even on the ground, including sandy surfaces like those found at the beach. The innovative stand provides flexibility for users in different settings and allows for comfortable and convenient use of electronic devices.
news.headline: Inventor from Hayward, Calif. creates hands-free phone/tablet stand for use in chairs, beds, sofas, & sand at beach.

news.headline: SS removes restrictions on phone benefit filings, avoiding influx of thousands to offices per week.

news.summary: A recent report on the United States Digital Transformation Consulting Services Market shows promising growth opportunities. Valued at USD 40.8 Billion in 2024, the market is projected to reach USD 88.94 Billion by 2030, indicating a substantial CAGR of 13.70%. This significant growth is attributed to various factors driving the market forward.
news.headline: The US Digital Transformation Consulting Services Market valued at USD 40.8B in 2024, expected to reach USD 88.94B by 2030 with a CAGR of 13.70%.

news.summary: Trading lower on Thursday is Willis Towers Watson, with their shares (NASDAQ: WTW) experiencing a decline. The company recently announced that Liberty Specialty Markets (LSM) has started utilizing Neuron, WTW's digital trading platform, for live trading of Directors & Officers (D&O) and Cyber risks. LSM's capacity on Neuron was initiated on March 31, 2025, focusing on Cyber and D&O business lines initially. There are plans to enhance Neuron's capabilities in 2025 by adding more classes and partners. Neuron facilitates real-time connection between brokers and insurers, simplifying and expediting the trading of intricate specialty risks while enhancing efficiency across the insurance value chain.
news.headline: Willis Towers Watson stock is down as Liberty Specialty Markets activates Neuron platform on March 31, 2025, for live trading of D&O and Cyber risks, expanding capabilities in 2025.

news.summary: A partnership between e.l.f. Beauty brand e.l.f. Cosmetics and professional race car driver Katherine Legge is being intensified to Empower.Legendary.Females. Legge, the sole female competitor in NASCAR Xfinity Series and NASCAR Cup Series, recently made history by becoming the first woman since Danica Patrick in 2018 to start a NASCAR Cup Series race. The collaboration aims to support female representation in the world of NASCAR, boosting Legge's presence in the racing sphere. This move follows e.l.f. Beauty's public listing on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ELF.
news.headline: e.l.f. Cosmetics partners with driver Katherine Legge for empowerment in NASCAR; only woman in Xfinity and Cup Series.
